title: Metro
description: A metro management system for Minecraft servers
body:
**Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/7tJeSZPZgv) to share your idea and discuss!**

Tutorial: [bilibili](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1jEaLzMEZ7); [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rpg4JuvXDHU)

Create and manage an automated public transportation network. Inspired by the survival server newnan.city.

![example](https://i.imgur.com/TbvWjBR.gif)

Features:
Line & Stop Management: Create, delete, and manage Lines (routes, names, unique colors, terminus) and Stops (defined spatial areas, precise stop location, and Transfer configurations).
Admin Commands:
Use the command /m to get help with admin commands. Details are in the document.

Permissions:
metro.admin: Access to all /m admin commands.
metro.use: Allows players to use the subway system.

Build your server's public transportation system with Metro!
